carry_verdict.headline_en: NO — loses roughly 0.63% per year, net of hedge
carry_verdict.headline_zh: 不要做 — 对冲后约亏 0.63%/年
chain: 借入 CNY · CNH HIBOR 1 年
carry_verdict.reasoning_en: Forward premium absorbs the nominal carry — hedging cost is larger than yield pickup.
carry_verdict.reasoning_zh: 远期升水吃掉了名义利差，对冲成本 > 收益。

policy_stance.reading_en: None of the three defence levers is active. PBOC is letting market dynamics run; the current spot level appears to be inside the policy tolerance band.
policy_stance.reading_zh: 三条防御工具都没有出手。央行让市场自己跑，当前汇率水平在政策容忍区间之内。
